en: You think this is a game?
You're too young to train here. End of story.
Quit wasting our time. Get the fuck out of here.
I'm sorry if there's a misunderstanding.
It's not the end of the world. Just go away.
ko: 세상이 끝난 건 아니야. 그냥 꺼져.

en: And I will have to call the police. Don't you look at me.
Do you think you're ever getting in this house?
ko: 이 집에 들어갈 수 있다고 생각해?

en: You're never getting in this fucking house.
ko: 이 집에 절대 들어갈 수 없어.

en: Never. Get the fuck off my porch. Get off my porch!
Sooner or later, we all became what Tyler wanted us to be.
ko: 결국 우리는 모두 타일러가 원하는 대로 변했어.

en: I'm gonna go inside and I'm gonna get a shovel.
Got two black shirts? Sir? Two pair of black pants.
ko: 검은 셔츠 두 개 있어? 두 개의 검은 바지도.
